conclusion.blocker: pair-index-only tiny rules do not preserve enough of the FEC6 selector's component gain; the rate saving is large enough, but component proxy loss is roughly an order of magnitude above the CPU allowance

hypothesis: source-free/tiny pair-index-only selector prior for PR101/FEC6

component_risk.evidence_grade: pair-row proxy/advisory; not exact CPU/CUDA score evidence
